# GigNVenue

> GigNVenue is a live music venue booking marketplace connecting independent artists and bookers with venue owners across the United States. Artists browse and request venues; hosts list their spaces and manage bookings — all through a single platform.

## What GigNVenue does

- Artists and bookers search for music venues by location, capacity, price, and amenities
- Artists submit booking requests for specific dates with event details
- Venue hosts review requests, approve or decline, and manage their calendar
- Upon approval, a 20% deposit is held via Stripe; the artist pays an 5% booking fee at confirmation
- Contact details between artist and host are exchanged only after payment is completed
- Performance agreements are auto-generated at confirmation
- Venue hosts can feature open dates to attract bookings

## Who it's for

- **Artists and bookers**: independent musicians, bands, event producers looking to book live music venues without cold-calling or intermediaries
- **Venue hosts**: bar owners, club operators, event space managers who want to fill their calendar with live music bookings

## Key pages

- [Homepage](https://gignvenue.com/) — search and browse music venues
- [How It Works](https://gignvenue.com/how-it-works.html) — full explanation of the booking and hosting process
- [List Your Venue](https://gignvenue.com/list-your-venue.html) — for venue owners who want to list their space
- [Pricing](https://gignvenue.com/pricing.html) — free to list; 5% booking fee paid by artists on confirmed bookings only
- [Help Center](https://gignvenue.com/help.html) — FAQ for artists and hosts
- [About](https://gignvenue.com/about.html) — mission and story
- [Contact](https://gignvenue.com/contact.html) — support contact form

## Pricing model

- Venue hosts: free to list, no subscription, no fees
- Artists: free to browse and request; 5% booking fee only on confirmed bookings
- Deposits: 20% of venue nightly rate, held at confirmation, released to host after the event

## Geographic scope

Currently serving the United States only. USD pricing throughout.

## Contact

- Support: support@gignvenue.com
- Privacy inquiries: privacy@gignvenue.com
